documents.label: 278 Transaction
documents.title: Deputy Commissioner, Social Security Administration
documents.summary: Large 278-T signed 02/27/2026 (filer received a 0-day filing extension) and OGE-certified 04/07/2026. Discloses dozens of sales executed on 01/30/2026 (Agilent, Apple, AbbVie, Abbott, Accenture, Allstate, Alphabet, Amazon, Berkshire Hathaway, Boeing, Chevron, Disney, Duke Energy, salesforce.com, Cigna, Carlyle Group, etc.) within an SMA, almost all in the $1,001-$15,000 range with one Amazon lot at $15,001-$50,000. The pages reviewed (1-5) show transactions 1-82; the full report continues beyond. All rows marked No on the 30-day notification flag.

documents.label: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.title: Deputy Commissioner
documents.summary: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification digitally signed 03/25/2026. Lists ethics agreement signed 9/29/2025, confirmed 12/18/2025, certification due 3/25/2026. Marks N/A on resignations, No on divestitures-completed-within-time-period, Yes on having filed a 278-T (filing date 2/27/2026), and Yes on managed accounts, interim recusals, and both recusal categories. Comments section states 90-day obligations are satisfied but discloses a 120-day extension to divest TPG Twin Brook Capital Income Fund, Blue Owl Credit Income Corp., Oaktree Strategic Credit Fund, and KKR Real Estate Select Trust, plus a 30-day extension after a lockout period for Blue Owl Technology Finance Corp.; Mody states a new certification will be filed at the end of the 120-day period.

documents.label: Ethics Agreement
documents.title: Deputy Commissioner (nominee)
documents.summary: Ethics agreement letter to SSA DAEO Christopher Harris dated 09/29/2025. Section 2 commits Mody's consulting firm Ivy Hill Advisors LLC to remain dormant during appointment. Section 3 covers Common Values PAC impartiality recusal. Section 4 lists divestiture of stocks within 90 days of confirmation: Alphabet, Amazon, AT&T, Autodesk, Cloudflare, Meta, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Oracle, and Taiwan Semiconductor. Same section also lists 120-day divestitures of TPG Twin Brook, Blue Owl Credit Income, Oaktree Strategic Credit, KKR Real Estate Select Trust, plus a 30-day-post-lockout commitment for Blue Owl Technology Finance Corp. Section 6 addresses spouse's employment at Johns Hopkins Community Physicians.

documents.label: Nominee 278
documents.title: Deputy Commissioner (nominee)
documents.summary: Nominee 278e signed 07/28/2025 and OGE-certified 09/29/2025. Lists prior positions including Staff Director, Senate Republican Conference under Sen. John Barrasso (9/2019-1/2025), Ivy Hill Advisors LLC (President 3/2025-Present), and Trump Vance 2025 Transition Inc. (volunteer advisor 7/2024-4/2025). Reports Common Values PAC salary ($40,000), a Roth IRA holding QQQM, and an IRA #2 with a William Blair All Cap Growth SMA containing 30+ individual stock holdings (each $1,001-$15,000 except MSFT and NVDA at $15,001-$50,000) including Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Broadcom, NVIDIA, and Microsoft.

propublicaCheck.filingsListedThere: Arjun Mody did not appear in the ProPublica Trump Team Financial Disclosures landing page check or top-wealthiest list. The full ProPublica database may include him via search; not verified from the landing page alone.
propublicaCheck.discrepancies: None identified between OGE filings collected here and any ProPublica record. Note that Mody's Section 4 ethics-agreement divestiture list (Alphabet, Amazon, AT&T, Autodesk, Cloudflare, Meta, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Oracle, TSMC) maps onto the 01/30/2026 sales burst in the 04/10/2026 278-T.
